title: Tender Peruvian Smoked Mackerel Rocoto Relleno
description: A fresh and energizing Peruvian dish featuring smoked mackerel, lardons render, and rocoto relleno, perfect for a lunch meal. This kosher friendly recipe combines the flavors of Peru with the tenderness of smoked mackerel.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roast the rocoto peppers in the oven for 30 minutes, then peel and chop them.
Render the lardons in a pan over medium heat until crispy, then set aside.
In the same pan, saute the chopped onion and minced garlic until softened.
Add the aji amarillo sauce to the pan and stir to combine.
Flake the smoked mackerel into the pan and stir to combine with the onion and garlic mixture.
Stuff each roasted rocoto pepper with the mackerel mixture, then top with quinoa and chopped cilantro.
Serve the rocoto relleno hot, garnished with rendered lardons and additional cilantro if desired.
